settings.price_tracking_desc: Track filament price changes over time.
settings.build_plates_desc: Track build plate usage and surface condition per printer.
settings.dryer_models_desc: Reference database of filament dryer specifications.
settings.storage_desc: Track humidity and storage conditions for each spool.
settings.quotas_desc: Set print and filament quotas per user.
settings.stagger_desc: Start prints across a group with time delays to manage power.
